parameters.query:
SELECT set_config('app.current_entity', '{{ $json.entity_id }}', true);

WITH new_event AS (
  INSERT INTO events
    (event_type, source, entity_id, payload, payload_signature,
     status, idempotency_key, pipeline_version)
  SELECT '{{ $json.event_type }}',
         '{{ $json.source }}',
         {{ $json.entity_id }},
         $pl${{ $json.payload_json }}$pl$::jsonb,
         '{{ $json.payload_signature }}',
         'done',
         '{{ $json.idempotency_key }}',
         '{{ $json.pipeline_version }}'
   WHERE NOT EXISTS (
     SELECT 1 FROM events WHERE idempotency_key = '{{ $json.idempotency_key }}'
   )
  RETURNING id, trace_id
),
audit AS (
  INSERT INTO audit_log
    (pipeline, event_id, trace_id, action, entity_id,
     record_type, pipeline_version, result)
  SELECT 'bank_csv_import', ne.id, ne.trace_id,
         'csv_imported', {{ $json.entity_id }},
         'bank_transaction_batch', '{{ $json.pipeline_version }}', 'success'
    FROM new_event ne
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT (SELECT id FROM new_event)  AS event_id,
       (SELECT id FROM audit)      AS audit_id,
       {{ $json.bank_account_id }} AS bank_account_id,
       {{ $json.rows_received }}   AS rows_received,
       {{ $json.rows_inserted }}   AS rows_inserted,
       '{{ $json.date_min }}'::date AS date_min,
       '{{ $json.date_max }}'::date AS date_max;
